mapper.select: SELECT destination_id, customer_id, name, phone, postal_code, address, created_at, updated_at FROM delivery_destinations
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery_destinations (customer_id, name, phone, postal_code, address) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{postalCode}, #{address})
mapper.update: UPDATE delivery_destinations SET customer_id = #{customerId}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, address = #{address}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE destination_id = #{destinationId}
